[30;1m4255 | [0m[35m	// 26 Feb 16:19:34[0m
[30;1m4256 | [0m[35m	function timestamp() {[0m
[30;1m4257 | [0m[35m	  var d = new Date();[0m
[30;1m4258 | [0m[35m	  var time = [pad(d.getHours()),[0m
[30;1m4259 | [0m[35m	              pad(d.getMinutes()),[0m
[30;1m4260 | [0m[35m	              pad(d.getSeconds())].join(':');[0m
[30;1m4261 | [0m[35m	  return [d.getDate(), months[d.getMonth()], time].join(' ');[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m17[0m[34m of [0m[33m26[0m[31m ]--[0m
   Rule Id: [34mBD000610[0m
       Tag: [34mSecurity.Backdoor.LOLBAS.Linux[0m
  Severity: [36mModerate[0m, Confidence: [36mLow[0m
  Filename: [33m/package/holder.js[0m
   Pattern: [32m\s(apt|apt\-get|aria2c|arp|ash|awk|base64|bash|bpftrace|busybox|cat|chmod|chown|cp|cpan|cpulimit|crontab|csh|curl|cut|dash|dd|diff|dmesg|dmsetup|dnf|docker|dpkg|easy_install|ed|emacs|env|expand|expect|facter|find|finger|flock|fmt|ftp|gawk|gdb|gimp|git|grep|head|iftop|ionice|ip|irb|jjs|journalctl|jrunscript|ksh|ld\.so|ldconfig|logsave|ltrace|lua|mail|mawk|mount|mtr|mv|mysql|nano|nawk|nc|nice|nl|nmap|node|od|openssl|perl|pg|php|pic|pico|pip|puppet|readelf|red|rlogin|rlwrap|rpm|rpmquery|rsync|ruby|run\-mailcap|run\-parts|rvim|scp|screen|script|sed|service|setarch|sftp|shuf|smbclient|socat|sort|sqlite3|ssh|start\-stop\-daemon|stdbuf|strace|systemctl|tail|tar|taskset|tclsh|tcpdump|tee|telnet|tftp|time|timeout|tmux|top|ul|unexpand|uniq|unshare|vi|vim|watch|wget|whois|wish|xargs|xxd|yum|zsh|zypper)\s[0m

[30;1m261 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m262 | [0m[35m## Runtime settings[0m
[30;1m263 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m264 | [0m[35mHolder provides several options at runtime that affect the process of image generation. These are pa[0m
[30;1m265 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m266 | [0m[35m* `domain`: The domain to use for image generation. Default value: `holder.js`.[0m
[30;1m267 | [0m[35m* `dataAttr`: The HTML attribute used to define a fallback to the native `src` attribute. Default va[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m22[0m[34m of [0m[33m26[0m[31m ]--[0m

[30;1m163 | [0m[35m### Text[0m
[30;1m164 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m165 | [0m[35mHolder automatically adds line breaks to text that goes outside of the image boundaries. If the text[0m
[30;1m166 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m167 | [0m[35m```html[0m
[30;1m168 | [0m[35m<img data-src="holder.js/300x200?text=Add \n line breaks \n anywhere.">[0m

[30;1m105 | [0m[35mThere are two ways to use custom themes with Holder:[0m
[30;1m106 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m107 | [0m[35m* Include theme at runtime to render placeholders already using the theme name[0m
[30;1m108 | [0m[35m* Include theme at any point and re-render placeholders that are using the theme name[0m
[30;1m109 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m110 | [0m[35mThe first approach is the easiest. After you include ``holder.js``, add a ``script`` tag that adds t[0m
[30;1m111 | [0m[35m[0m
